title: Dash's ToDo Mod
description: A simple minecraft mod that lets the user have a ToDo list.
body:
# 📝 Simple ToDo List

![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.1-brightgreen)
![NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-NeoForge-orange)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue)

Keep your Minecraft projects organized without ever leaving the game! Whether you are planning a massive megabase or just reminding yourself to smelt some iron, this mod provides a clean, integrated way to manage your tasks.

---

## 🚀 Features

* **Integrated ToDo GUI:** A dedicated interface to add, edit, and remove your goals easily.
* **Toggleable HUD:** Keep your current tasks on-screen while you play, or hide them for full immersion.
* **Smart Line Wrapping:** No more cut-off text! Long tasks automatically wrap to fit the interface, keeping your list clean and readable.
* **Icons! :** Render you tasks list with icons by holding an item in your main hand and Ctrl + L-Clicking you task in the gui, then switching your hud mode to icons by using the new button in the gui!
* **Lightweight & Fast:** Designed to be performance-friendly and stay out of the way of your gameplay.

---

## ⌨️ Keybindings

Stay in control with these default hotkeys (you can rebind these in your standard Minecraft controls menu):

| Action | Key |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Open ToDo Menu** | `N` |
| **Toggle HUD Visibility** | `H` |

---

## 🛠️ How to Use

1.  **Manage Tasks:** Press **'N'** to open the main menu. From here, you can add new objectives or check off completed ones.
2.  **Visual Tracking:** Your tasks will appear on your screen via the HUD.
3.  **Icon Rendering:** You can switch your task hud mode to icons for a more concise task list.
4.  **Clean View:** If you need a clear screen for a screenshot or combat, simply tap **'H'** to toggle the HUD off.

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Ensure you have the correct version of **Fabric** or **Forge** installed.
2. Drop the `.jar` file into your `mods` folder.
3. Launch the game and start crossing items off your list!

---

**Made by Dash_Ketch**
